folio.label: 53r
folio.l: Of many a pilgrym , hast thow cristes curs
For of thy ¹selee , ©et they fare the wers
That they han eten , in thy stobel goos
For in thy shoppe , is many a flye loos
Now telle on gentil Roger , be thy name
But ©et I preye the , be nat wrotú for game
A man may sey ful sotú , in game and pleye
¢ Thow seist ful sotú , q¶ Roger , be my feye
But swhicú pley , quade pley , as the Flemyng seitú
And æäfore herry Bailly , be thy feitú
Be thow nat wrotú , er we de¹te heere
Thougú that my tale , be of an hostelere
But natheles , I wol nat telle it ©et
But er we de¹te¹tede¹te , I wysse æè shalt be quyt´de¹te38 de is underdotted, but it is also separated with a stroke.ODR
And ther with alle , he lougú & made chere
And seide his tale , as ©e shuln after here
